source_section.title_label_raw: Accessory Structures, Backyard Suite Uses, and Shipping Containers Applicability of Accessory Structure, Backyard Suite Use, and Shipping Container Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Structures, Backyard Suite Uses, and Shipping Containers Applicability of Accessory Structure, Backyard Suite Use, and Shipping Container Requirements

provisions.heading_context_raw: Structures, Backyard Suite Uses, and Shipping Containers Applicability of Accessory Structure, Backyard Suite Use, and Shipping Container Requirements
provisions.text: With the exception of buildings within a heritage conservation district, any accessory structure, backyard suite use, or shipping container erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any accessory structure, backyard suite use, or shipping container, shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Accessory Structure Location

sections.title_label_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:
provisions.text: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:
provisions.text: in the same zone as the main building or use that it is intended to serve; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:
provisions.text: in an abutting zone in which the main building or use is permitted; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:
provisions.text: on the same lot as the main building or use that it is intended to serve; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:
provisions.text: on a lot that abuts or is directly across a street from the lot that contains the main building or use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any accessory structure shall be required to be located:
provisions.text: In the case that the accessory structure is not located on the same lot as the main building or use that it is intended to serve, then both lots are required to be under common ownership. Accessory Structure Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures shall meet the minimum front or flanking setback requirements, as shown on Schedule 18, that are applicable for any main building in the same zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: Accessory structures in an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: excluding the Westmount Subdivision (WS) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3C, not be located closer to any streetline than any main building; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: in the Westmount Subdivision (WS) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3C, be located a minimum of 1.5 metres to a maximum of 18.5 metres from any streetline.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 328(2) and 328(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: In the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B, accessory structures shall be required to be located no less than 9.5 metres from any front or flanking lot line. Accessory Structure Side or Rear Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 329(2) and 329(3), accessory structures

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 329(2) and 329(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 329(2) and 329(3), accessory structures shall be required to be located a minimum of 1.25 metres from any side or rear lot line.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 329(2) and 329(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: In the Westmount Subdivision (WS) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3C, an accessory structure shall be required to be located a minimum of 0.6 metre from any side lot line.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 329(2) and 329(3), accessory structures
provisions.text: In any CLI, LI, or HRI zone, an accessory structure located in a side or rear yard that abuts an HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone shall meet the setback requirements applicable to the main building or use. Accessory Structure Separation Distances

sections.title_label_raw: An accessory structure shall be separated from any main building or

provisions.heading_context_raw: An accessory structure shall be separated from any main building or
provisions.text: An accessory structure shall be separated from any main building or any other accessory structure on the same lot by no less than 1.25 metres. Accessory Structure Height

sections.title_label_raw: An accessory structure's height shall not exceed 7.7 metres. (RC-

provisions.heading_context_raw: An accessory structure's height shall not exceed 7.7 metres. (RC-
provisions.text: An accessory structure's height shall not exceed 7.7 metres. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24) Accessory Structure Lot Coverage Exemption

sections.title_label_raw: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no

provisions.heading_context_raw: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Accessory Structure Footprint and Area

sections.title_label_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the maximum size of its footprint, except: (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: subject to Clause 333(1)(b), in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN- 1, COR, HR-2, HR- 1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone: 60.0 square metres; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: in the Westmount Subdivision (WS) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3C, 6.0 square metres within a front yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any new accessory structure shall not have a floor area greater than 93.0 square metres. (RCCC- Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22) (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: An accessory structure that is located in a rear yard and that is lawfully existing on the coming into force date of this By-law shall be permitted to change its use into a backyard suite use regardless of its height, footprint, floor area, side setback, rear setback, separation distance, or lot coverage, as long as all other applicable built form requirements contained within this Chapter are met. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: An accessory structure that is located in a flanking yard and that is lawfully existing on the coming into force date of this By- law shall be permitted to change its use into a backyard suite use regardless of its height, footprint, floor area, flanking yard set-back, side setback, rear setback, or lot coverage, as long as all other applicable built form requirements contained within this Chapter are met.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: Repealed (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new accessory structure shall have no restriction on the
provisions.text: An enclosed or internal staircase or elevator leading to a dwelling unit within an accessory structure is exempted from the floor area requirements for accessory structures. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24) Quonset Huts

sections.title_label_raw: Except in an CLI, LI, HRI, or DND zone, quonset huts are prohibited.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except in an CLI, LI, HRI, or DND zone, quonset huts are prohibited.
provisions.text: Except in an CLI, LI, HRI, or DND zone, quonset huts are prohibited. General Requirements for Shipping Containers

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 336(2), a shipping container shall not be used to contain an office use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: Subject to Section 336, shipping containers may be used as a dwelling unit, including as a backyard suite use, in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, CDD-2, CDD-1, INS, or H zone. (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: Subject to Section 336, in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, CDD-2, CDD-1, or INS zone, shipping containers shall not be used as an accessory structure, other than for a backyard suite use where permitted in Subsection 335(2.4). (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: In a CLI, LI, HRI, PCF, or RPK zone, a shipping container shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: Subject to subsections 335(5) and 335(6), in (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) all other zones, a shipping container that does not contain a dwelling unit (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) shall not be located within a front or flanking yard. (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: If permitted in Subsection 335(2.4), a shipping container used as a main building shall meet the requirements for main buildings in the zone. (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Oct 11/22;E-Nov 16/22)
provisions.text: If permitted in Subsection 335(2.4), a shipping container used as a backyard suite shall meet the requirements for backyard suites. (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) Specific Requirements for Shipping Containers within the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area

provisions.heading_context_raw: Shipping containers are permitted within:
provisions.text: Shipping containers are permitted within:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Shipping containers are permitted within:
provisions.text: the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, of the DD zone; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Shipping containers are permitted within:
provisions.text: the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B, of the DH zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Shipping containers are permitted within:
provisions.text: A shipping container may only be used to contain an office use, retail use, restaurant use, drinking establishment use, or urban farm use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Shipping containers are permitted within:
provisions.text: A shipping container shall be located a minimum of 9.5 metres from any front or flanking lot line. Siting Requirements for Heritage Conservation Districts
